response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering, including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, which aligns well with the role's technical requirements. However, his resume lacks explicit mention of production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or cloud platform expertise (beyond general mentions). His background in diverse stacks is strong, but the direct AI/GenAI experience appears limited to recent months, raising questions about depth in this domain.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with leadership experience (Staff Engineer at re:cinq)
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks
Proven ability to design and deploy scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, Direct Mail automation)
concerns: Limited explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, or multi-agent systems
No clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions (primary role is full-stack engineering)
Minimal mention of cloud platform expertise (beyond general AWS/GCP references in resume)
